---
title: "How LLMs learn to reason"
description: "The RL lineage behind reasoning models, traced one algorithm at a time, from REINFORCE and PPO through GRPO and DPO to what R1 actually shipped."
image: 01-reasoning.png
image-alt: "Cover image for the series: How LLMs learn to reason"
order: 1
parts: 7
date: 2026-02-16
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "order"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, date, description]
  feed:
    title: "How LLMs learn to reason — series"
    description: "The RL lineage behind reasoning models, traced one algorithm at a time, from REINFORCE and PPO through GRPO and DPO to what R1 actually shipped."
---

Reasoning models did not arrive in one breakthrough. They came out of a reinforcement-learning lineage that is worth following in order: REINFORCE and PPO set the mechanics, GRPO and DPO changed what the reward and the update look like, tool-use RL extended it past single answers, and R1 is where it became something you could actually ship. This series builds that chain one step at a time, so that by the end R1 reads as a consequence rather than a surprise.

Read in order:
